moduleNodes.name: SWOT Analysis
moduleNodes.description: A framework for identifying internal Strengths and Weaknesses, and external Opportunities and Threats.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Analyze the business scenario:

[S] Strengths: Internal advantages
[W] Weaknesses: Internal limitations
[O] Opportunities: External favorable factors
[T] Threats: External risks

moduleNodes.name: PESTEL Analysis
moduleNodes.description: Analyzes macro-environmental factors: Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Environmental, and Legal.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Evaluate the macro-environment:

[P] Political
[E] Economic
[S] Social
[T] Technological
[En] Environmental
[L] Legal

moduleNodes.name: Porter's Five Forces
moduleNodes.description: Analyzes industry attractiveness and competitive intensity.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Assess the industry structure:

[R] Rivalry: Competitor intensity
[S] Supplier Power
[B] Buyer Power
[Sub] Threat of Substitutes
[Ent] Threat of New Entrants

moduleNodes.name: BCG Matrix
moduleNodes.description: Portfolio analysis based on market growth and market share.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Categorize the business units:

[Stars] High growth, high share
[CashCows] Low growth, high share
[QuestionMarks] High growth, low share
[Dogs] Low growth, low share

moduleNodes.name: Ansoff Matrix
moduleNodes.description: Framework for identifying growth strategies (Market/Product).
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Define growth paths:

[MP] Market Penetration
[MD] Market Development
[PD] Product Development
[Di] Diversification

moduleNodes.name: Value Chain Analysis
moduleNodes.description: Examines internal activities to identify competitive advantages.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Analyze value creation:

[PA] Primary Activities (Inbound, Ops, Outbound, Marketing, Service)
[SA] Support Activities (HR, Tech, Procurement, Infrastructure)

moduleNodes.name: STP Model
moduleNodes.description: Core strategy: Segmentation, Targeting, and Positioning.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Define target strategy:

[S] Segmentation
[T] Targeting
[P] Positioning

moduleNodes.name: 4Ps Marketing Mix
moduleNodes.description: Classic marketing mix: Product, Price, Place, Promotion.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Design the mix:

[Pr] Product
[Pri] Price
[Pl] Place
[Pro] Promotion

moduleNodes.name: 7Ps Marketing Mix
moduleNodes.description: Extended mix for services: 4Ps + People, Process, Physical Evidence.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Design service mix:

[Pr] Product
[Pri] Price
[Pl] Place
[Pro] Promotion
[Pe] People
[Proc] Process
[Phy] Physical Evidence

moduleNodes.name: 4Cs Model
moduleNodes.description: Consumer-centric marketing: Customer, Cost, Convenience, Communication.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Analyze from customer perspective:

[C1] Customer Solution
[C2] Cost
[C3] Convenience
[C4] Communication

moduleNodes.name: The Golden Circle
moduleNodes.description: Start with Why to inspire and communicate brand purpose.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Define brand essence:

[Why] Purpose/Belief
[How] Process/Values
[What] Product/Service

moduleNodes.name: Positioning Framework
moduleNodes.description: Defining the unique value proposition in the target's mind.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Define market position:

[Target] Who is it for?
[Frame] Category
[Diff] Key differentiator
[Reason] Reason to believe

moduleNodes.name: Minimum Viable Product (MVP)
moduleNodes.description: Version of a product with just enough features to satisfy early customers.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Define the MVP:

[Core] Core value hypothesis
[Features] Minimum feature set
[Metrics] Success criteria

moduleNodes.name: Product-Market Fit (PMF)
moduleNodes.description: The degree to which a product satisfies a strong market demand.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Evaluate PMF:

[Needs] Market underserved needs
[Value] Value proposition
[UX] User experience quality

moduleNodes.name: AARRR (Pirate Metrics)
moduleNodes.description: Growth funnel: Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Referral, Revenue.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Optimize funnel:

[Ac] Acquisition
[Ai] Activation
[R1] Retention
[Re] Referral
[Rev] Revenue

moduleNodes.name: RARRA Framework
moduleNodes.description: Retention-first growth model: Retention, Activation, Referral, Revenue, Acquisition.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Optimize for retention:

[R1] Retention
[Ai] Activation
[Re] Referral
[Rev] Revenue
[Ac] Acquisition

moduleNodes.name: North Star Metric
moduleNodes.description: The single metric that best captures the core value your product delivers.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Define North Star:

[NSM] The core metric
[Inputs] Leading indicators

moduleNodes.name: ICE/RICE Scoring
moduleNodes.description: Prioritization framework for growth experiments.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Score the task:

[R] Reach
[I] Impact
[C] Confidence
[E] Ease/Effort

moduleNodes.name: AIDA Model
moduleNodes.description: Cognitive stages of a consumer: Attention, Interest, Desire, Action.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Structure the message:

[A] Attention
[I] Interest
[D] Desire
[Ac] Action

moduleNodes.name: PESO Model
moduleNodes.description: Integrated media framework: Paid, Earned, Shared, Owned.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Plan media mix:

[P] Paid
[E] Earned
[S] Shared
[O] Owned

moduleNodes.name: AISAS Model
moduleNodes.description: Digital-era behavior: Attention, Interest, Search, Action, Share.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Map digital journey:

[A] Attention
[I] Interest
[S1] Search
[Ac] Action
[S2] Share

moduleNodes.name: Content Marketing Matrix
moduleNodes.description: Mapping content to user intent (Entertain, Educate, Persuade, Inspire).
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Identify content types:

[Entertain] Viral/Games
[Educate] Articles/Whitepapers
[Persuade] Case studies/Demos
[Inspire] Reviews/Celebrity

moduleNodes.name: FAB Formula
moduleNodes.description: Sales/copywriting tool: Features, Advantages, Benefits.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Convert features to value:

[F] Feature: What it is
[A] Advantage: What it does
[B] Benefit: What it means for user

moduleNodes.name: SCQA Framework
moduleNodes.description: Storytelling structure: Situation, Conflict, Question, Answer.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Structure the narrative:

[S] Situation
[C] Conflict
[Q] Question
[A] Answer

moduleNodes.name: User Persona
moduleNodes.description: Semi-fictional representation of your ideal customer.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Build persona:

[Bio] Demographics
[Goals] What they want
[Pain] Challenges
[Beh] Behavior

moduleNodes.name: Jobs to be Done (JTBD)
moduleNodes.description: Focusing on the 'job' a customer hires a product to do.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Identify the job:

[Job] Functional goal
[Social] Emotional/Social aspect
[Circ] Circumstances

moduleNodes.name: Customer Journey Map
moduleNodes.description: Visualizing the user's experience across touchpoints.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Map the journey:

[Aware] Discovery
[Cons] Consideration
[Pur] Purchase
[Serv] Service
[Loy] Loyalty

moduleNodes.name: RFM Model
moduleNodes.description: Customer segmentation based on Recency, Frequency, and Monetary value.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Segment by value:

[R] Recency
[F] Frequency
[M] Monetary

moduleNodes.name: Net Promoter Score (NPS)
moduleNodes.description: Measuring customer loyalty and brand advocacy.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Calculate NPS:

[Prom] Promoters (9-10)
[Pass] Passives (7-8)
[Det] Detractors (0-6)

moduleNodes.name: The Hook Model
moduleNodes.description: Four-step process for building habit-forming products.
moduleNodes.defaultPrompt:
Design the loop:

[Trigger] Internal/External
[Action] Simplest behavior
[Reward] Variable reward
[Investment] User effort
